# Swoop Club Intelligence: Comprehensive Development Plan

## 1. Executive Summary

Swoop’s current website possesses a genuinely differentiated strategic foundation. The copy speaks directly to the GM buyer, and vertical-specific conversion mechanics like the ROI Calculator and the "Not a Pitch Deck" reframe are best-in-class. However, execution falls 15–20% short of the premium standard required for a $6K–$18K ACV SaaS product. 

**The highest-leverage issue across the site is a critical lack of visual and social proof.** Across both core conversion pages, we rely on a single named testimonial, zero client logos, and zero product screenshots. GMs are being asked to hand over their data and $18k/year based entirely on written promises. 

**The Financial Opportunity:**
By executing just three basic SaaS conventions, we have a clear path to unlock **~$54.8K+ in new ARR per quarter**:
1. **Adding a Hero CTA on the Contact Page:** Recovers 15-25% of non-scrollers (~$30K+ ARR).
2. **Adding a "Most Popular" Badge & Card Borders:** Shifts plan selection toward the $499 tier (~$14K+ ARR).
3. **Adding 2-3 Named Testimonials:** Lifts conversion at the point of friction (~$10.8K ARR).

**The Action Plan:**
This plan is tailored for our cross-functional pod (1-2 Engineers, 1 Designer, 1 Copy/Marketing Lead). We will address quick-win layout, typography, and CTA fixes in **Sprint 1**. **Sprint 2** will focus on injecting product visuals, proof density, and restructuring conversion sections. **Sprint 3** will tackle structural performance and interactive debt. The **Backlog** captures strategic brand and content investments for next quarter.

---

## 2. "Do Not Break" — Positive Patterns to Preserve

Before making changes, the team must protect these foundational assets:
1. **Operationally Specific Voice:** Keep phrases like "tee sheet leakage," "F&B staffing pressure," and "founding-partner clubs." (Lenses: GM, Storyteller, Brand Guardian).
2. **Risk Reversal Architecture:** The layered risk-reduction ("cancel any time," "$0 entry tier," "mutual NDA," "Zero IT required") is highly effective. (Lenses: GM, Closer, Skeptic).
3. **Interactive ROI Calculator:** This is our #1 conversion differentiator. Protect the core logic and board-ready artifact creation. (Lenses: Closer, GM).
4. **"Not a Pitch Deck" Reframe:** Never change this Contact page headline. It perfectly addresses buyer fatigue. (Lenses: Closer, Storyteller).
5. **Board-Aware Conversion Mechanics:** Keep mechanics like "Print this ROI report for my Board"—they show deep empathy for the GM's internal selling process. (Lenses: Closer, GM).

---

## 3. Success Metrics

| Sprint | Horizon | Target KPI | Leading Indicator |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Sprint 1** | Quick Wins (This Week) | +15% Contact Page Demo completions | ↓ Bounce rate in Contact hero; ↑ Clicks on pricing CTAs |
| **Sprint 2** | High-Impact (This Sprint) | +20% Pricing Page "Signals + Actions" selections | ↑ Interaction rate on ROI Calculator; ↑ Time on page |
| **Sprint 3** | Structural (1-2 Weeks) | Mobile conversion rate parity with Desktop | ↓ INP to <200ms; ↑ Mobile form completion rate |
| **Backlog** | Strategic (Next Quarter) | +30% Overall Site Demo requests | ↑ Trust Center visits; ↑ Video plays |

---

## 4. Prioritised Backlog

### Sprint 1 – Quick Wins (< 1 day each, ship within the week)

#### 1.1 Add Hero CTA Button with Anchor Link to Form
*   **Description:** Add a primary CTA button to the Contact hero so non-scrollers see the conversion path.
*   **File:** `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx`
*   **Before:** Hero section ends after the "WHAT YOU'LL LEAVE WITH" checklist with no interactive element.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    {/* Add immediately after the WHAT YOU'LL LEAVE WITH checklist section */}
    <div className="mt-10 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start gap-4">
      <a
        href="#demo-form"
        className="inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 bg-[#F3922D] text-[#1B1814] font-semibold text-lg rounded-lg hover:bg-[#E5841F] hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-[#F3922D]/20 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#F3922D] focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#F7F5F2]"
      >
        Get My Custom Retention Plan
        <svg className="ml-2 w-5 h-5 animate-bounce" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor">
          <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth={2} d="M19 14l-7 7m0 0l-7-7m7 7V3" />
        </svg>
      </a>
      <span className="text-sm text-[#1B1814]/60 mt-2 sm:mt-3">
        30 minutes · No credit card · Your data stays yours
      </span>
    </div>
    ```
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** ~$30K+ ARR (recovering 15-25% of non-scrollers)
*   **Lenses:** Closer, First-Timer, Architect

#### 1.2 Redesign Pricing Tier Cards (Most Popular Badge + Visual Containment)
*   **Description:** Add borders, "Most Popular" badge to the $499 tier, align feature lists, and standardize CTAs.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Three flat, undifferentiated columns of text with no card borders, no shadows, no background fills. Middle tier has no visual emphasis. CTAs vary.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    // PricingSection.jsx — Replace the pricing cards grid
    // (Abridged to highlight key component change verbatim)
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8 items-stretch">
      {tiers.map((tier) => (
        <div
          key={tier.name}
          className={`
            relative flex flex-col rounded-2xl p-8
            ${tier.popular
              ? 'bg-[#1B1814] text-white ring-2 ring-[#E87A2D] shadow-2xl scale-[1.02] lg:scale-105 z-10'
              : 'bg-[#F7F5F2] text-[#1B1814] ring-1 ring-[#E8E0D4]'
            }
          `}
        >
          {tier.popular && (
            <div className="absolute -top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#E87A2D] text-[#1B1814] text-sm font-semibold px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full tracking-wide uppercase">
              Most Popular
            </div>
          )}
    // ... continues per source report
    ```
*   **Owner:** Front-end, Copy
*   **Effort:** Medium (half day)
*   **Impact:** ~$14K+ ARR (shifts tier distribution toward revenue-generating plans)
*   **Lenses:** Architect, Closer, GM, Storyteller, Brand Guardian, First-Timer

#### 1.3 Increase All Body Text to 16px Minimum
*   **Description:** Target audience is 45-65; 13-14px text creates extreme friction. Bump to 16px minimum, line-height 1.6.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`, `RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`, `FaqSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Small, dense text in feature lists, calculator descriptions, and FAQ answers. Line-height appears cramped.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    // PricingSection.jsx — feature list items:
    <span className="text-[15px] leading-snug"> // minimum 15px for list items
    
    // PricingSection.jsx — tier descriptions:
    <p className="text-base leading-relaxed mb-8"> // 16px with 1.625 line-height
    
    // RoiCalculatorSection.jsx — all descriptive text:
    <p className="text-base leading-relaxed text-[#6B6158]">
    ```
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** High — readability directly affects time-on-page/conversion.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, GM, First-Timer, Brand Guardian

#### 1.4 Add Explicit Clarifier & Surface Urgency to Pricing Hero
*   **Description:** Add "Member Intelligence for Private Clubs" and move the "Tomorrow morning" urgency statement above the fold. Adds anchor links to pricing.
*   **File:** `src/landing/pages/PricingPage.jsx`
*   **Before:** Hero shows "PRICING" eyebrow → "Recover your software costs in 60 days. Start for zero." → subtext about 5 of 7 clubs → "Calculate your ROI" CTA.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    // PricingPage.jsx — Hero section snippet
    {/* Eyebrow with product descriptor */}
    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-6">
      <span className="text-[#E87A2D] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
        Pricing
      </span>
      <span className="text-white/30">·</span>
      <span className="text-[#B5956A] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">
        Member Intelligence for Private Clubs
      </span>
    </div>
    
    {/* Urgency line — surfaced from bottom of page */}
    <p className="text-base text-[#E87A2D] font-medium mb-8">
      Setup takes 10 minutes. Your first member brief arrives tomorrow morning.
    </p>
    
    {/* Dual CTAs with anchor navigation */}
    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-4 mb-6">
      <a href="#roi-calculator" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#E87A2D] text-[#1B1814] font-semibold py-4 px-8 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#D4691F] transition-colors shadow-lg">
        Calculate Your ROI
      </a>
      <a href="#pricing-tiers" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-white/80 font-medium py-4 px-8 rounded-xl ring-1 ring-white/20 hover:ring-white/40 hover:text-white transition-all">
        See Plans & Pricing
      </a>
    </div>
    ```
*   **Owner:** Front-end, Copy
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** High — instant clarity and anchor navigation prevents bounce.
*   **Lenses:** First-Timer, Closer, Storyteller, GM, Brand Guardian

#### 1.5 Fix Background Color from Pure White to Brand Cream
*   **Description:** Pure white reads as generic. Use brand standard #F7F5F2.
*   **File:** `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx` (and site-wide)
*   **Before:** `<section className="bg-white ...">`
*   **After:** `<section className="bg-[#F7F5F2] ...">`
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** Medium — establishes premium visual tone.
*   **Lenses:** Brand Guardian, Architect

#### 1.6 Fix Checkmark Icons from Green to Brand Orange
*   **Description:** Green checkmarks are off-palette. Unify the color system.
*   **File:** `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx`
*   **Before:** `<svg className="w-5 h-5 text-green-500 ...">`
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    <svg className="w-5 h-5 text-[#F3922D] flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2.5}>
      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7" />
    </svg>
    ```
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** Medium — Brand cohesion.
*   **Lenses:** Brand Guardian, Architect

#### 1.7 Fix Dark Section Text Contrast & Expand/Collapse Chevrons
*   **Description:** Small grey text on dark backgrounds fails WCAG. Also add missing chevrons to FAQs.
*   **File:** Global CSS / FAQ Components
*   **Before:** Supporting text on dark backgrounds is "likely fails WCAG 4.5:1 contrast". FAQ has "no plus/minus icon or chevron".
*   **After:** Update dark background paragraph classes to `text-[#FFFFFF]` or `text-white/80`. Add standard lucide-react `<ChevronDown />` to FAQ headers.
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** Medium — WCAG compliance, basic interactive affordances.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, Speedster

#### 1.8 Preload + Subset Fraunces Font
*   **Description:** Hero serif font takes too long to render on critical path.
*   **File:** `index.html` or Framework Layout file
*   **Before:** No preload link for Fraunces font.
*   **After:** `<link rel="preload" href="/fonts/Fraunces-subset.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin>`
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 1 hr)
*   **Impact:** High — ~600ms LCP improvement.
*   **Lenses:** Speedster

#### 1.9 Fix "© 2026" Copyright Date
*   **Description:** The footer has a future date which damages credibility.
*   **File:** Footer component
*   **Before:** `© 2026 Swoop`
*   **After:** `© {new Date().getFullYear()} Swoop`
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Quick Win (< 15 mins)
*   **Impact:** Medium — Trust foundation.
*   **Lenses:** Skeptic

### Sprint 2 – High-Impact (1–5 days each, ship within the sprint)

#### 2.1 Add Product Dashboard Preview to Hero Right Side
*   **Description:** Fills the dead space on the right side of the Contact hero and answers the #1 buyer question: "What does this actually look like?"
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/DashboardPreview.jsx` (New) & `src/landing/pages/ContactPage.jsx`
*   **Before:** Hero content block sits center-left ~60% of viewport with empty cream space to the right.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    // ContactPage.jsx snippet
    <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-16 items-center">
      {/* Left column — existing copy ... */}
      {/* Right column — dashboard preview */}
      <div className="lg:pl-4">
        <DashboardPreview />
      </div>
    </div>
    ```
    *(Implementation uses the full robust mock-up provided in the Contact Report via `DashboardPreview` component.)*
*   **Owner:** Design, Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (half day)
*   **Impact:** High — answers the #1 First-Timer objection instantly.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, First-Timer, GM, Skeptic, Closer

#### 2.2 Restructure Contact Dark Section (Form + Testimonials + Steps)
*   **Description:** Current layout is overwhelmed with 7+ competing blocks. Move testimonial to be visible *alongside* the form at the moment of commitment. Add validation/loading states to the form.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/DemoCtaSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Left column: headline → body text → testimonial → "what happens next" → reassurance. Right column: form. Testimonial is below the form's visual center. No loading state.
*   **After:** *(Replaces entire section with the comprehensive `DemoCtaSection` code block provided in Contact Report, moving Testimonials to Tier 1, Process to Tier 2, and adding `onSubmit` loading/success UI).*
*   **Owner:** Front-end, Design
*   **Effort:** Medium (1-2 days)
*   **Impact:** High — 10-20% form completion lift via Cialdini placement research.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, Closer, GM, Skeptic

#### 2.3 Redesign ROI Calculator Input Affordances
*   **Description:** The calculator is the best asset but looks like static text. Add borders, interactive cues, sliders with focus states.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Thin slider, input values that appear as plain text without borders, dense right panel with competing dollar figures at similar visual weights.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    {/* Numeric inputs with visible borders */}
    <input
      type="text"
      inputMode="numeric"
      value={input.value}
      onChange={(e) => input.setter(parseNumber(e.target.value))}
      className={`w-full bg-white border-2 border-[#E8E0D4] rounded-xl py-3 font-mono text-lg font-semibold text-[#1B1814] focus:border-[#E87A2D] focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#E87A2D]/10 hover:border-[#B5956A] transition-all duration-200`}
    />
    ```
    *(Utilise full redesigned right panel and slider states from Pricing Report)*
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (half day)
*   **Impact:** High — better UX drives engagement on primary conversion tool.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, Closer, First-Timer, Brand Guardian, GM

#### 2.4 Add Integration Logo Bar
*   **Description:** Buyers need to immediately know if Swoop integrates with their specific POS/Tee-sheet.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx` (New sub-section)
*   **Before:** Generic "14 integrations, mostly admin, tee sheet reservation" text in feature lists.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    {/* Integration Logos Section snippet */}
    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6 gap-6 items-center justify-items-center mb-10">
      {[
        { name: 'Jonas Club Software', logo: '/images/integrations/jonas.svg' },
        { name: 'Northstar Club Management', logo: '/images/integrations/northstar.svg' },
        { name: 'Club Essential', logo: '/images/integrations/club-essential.svg' },
    // ... mapped to logo grids
    ```
*   **Owner:** Design, Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (half day)
*   **Impact:** Medium-High — Removes major friction point ("Does this work with my stack?").
*   **Lenses:** GM, Skeptic, Closer, First-Timer

#### 2.5 Add 2-3 Additional Named Testimonials with Outcomes
*   **Description:** Stop relying on a single quote. Add real photos, names, club sizes, and metrics.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx` (or new `TestimonialsSection.jsx`)
*   **Before:** Single quote rendered as plain italic text with name/title/club below it. No photo.
*   **After:**
    ```jsx
    {/* Testimonials block snippet */}
    <div className="inline-flex self-start bg-[#E87A2D]/10 text-[#E87A2D] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full mb-4">
      $92K recovered in Year 1
    </div>
    <blockquote className="text-base leading-relaxed text-[#3D3529] mb-6 flex-grow">
      "Swoop flagged the membership trends a month before we would have noticed..."
    </blockquote>
    ```
*   **Owner:** Content, Sales, Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (Requires outreach for permission)
*   **Impact:** ~$10.8K ARR (social proof barrier removal).
*   **Lenses:** Skeptic, GM, Closer, Storyteller

#### 2.6 Code-Split ROI Calculator
*   **Description:** Calculator JS blocks the main thread. Defer loading via IntersectionObserver.
*   **File:** `PricingPage.jsx` / bundler config
*   **Before:** "50–150KB of JavaScript that must be downloaded, parsed, and compiled" synchronously.
*   **After:** `const RoiCalculator = React.lazy(() => import('./RoiCalculatorSection'));` (wrapped in `<Suspense fallback={<Placeholder/>}>`)
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (1 day)
*   **Impact:** High — ~200ms INP improvement, ~100KB initial bundle reduction.
*   **Lenses:** Speedster

#### 2.7 Add Implementation Timeline to Pricing
*   **Description:** Visually show the "14 days from signing to live" promise.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** "14 days from signing" hidden in text.
*   **After:** Add a horizontal step graphic: "Day 1 (Kickoff) → Day 2 (Integration) → Day 5 (Data Validation) → Day 14 (Go-Live)".
*   **Owner:** Design, Copy
*   **Effort:** Medium (1 day)
*   **Impact:** Medium — Reduces commitment anxiety.
*   **Lenses:** GM, First-Timer

---

### Sprint 3 – Structural (1–2 weeks each)

#### 3.1 Build Mobile-Optimized Pricing Comparison
*   **Description:** Currently, the cards squish or stack vertically without comparison context.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/PricingSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Standard flex-col stack on mobile making feature comparison impossible.
*   **After:** Implement a mobile sticky header toggle (Signals | Signals+Actions | Full Platform) that switches the visible feature list while keeping the CTA sticky.
*   **Owner:** Design, Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium/High (2-3 days)
*   **Impact:** High — Critical for mobile conversion.
*   **Lenses:** Architect, Speedster

#### 3.2 Replace Charting Library with Inline SVG
*   **Description:** The ROI calculator uses a heavy charting library for a single simple area chart.
*   **File:** `src/landing/components/RoiCalculatorSection.jsx`
*   **Before:** Heavy JS charting bundle dependency.
*   **After:** Render the area chart with native React inline SVG `<path d="..." />`.
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** High (2-3 days math/SVG logic)
*   **Impact:** High — Eliminates ~80KB JS overhead.
*   **Lenses:** Speedster

#### 3.3 Reduce Pricing CTAs via A/B Test
*   **Description:** Clean up "CTA Sprawl" (currently 6+ distinct paths).
*   **File:** `src/landing/pages/PricingPage.jsx`
*   **Before:** "6+ distinct CTAs creates decision paralysis"
*   **After:** Implement test showing only 3 CTAs: 1 Primary (Book Walkthrough), 1 Secondary (Start Free), 1 Content (ROI Report).
*   **Owner:** Product, Front-end
*   **Effort:** High (Test setup + tracking)
*   **Impact:** High — Reduces decision fatigue at the conversion point.
*   **Lenses:** Closer, GM

#### 3.4 Add Stat Card Count-Up Animations & Entrance Transitions
*   **Description:** Static numbers feel dead. Add Framer Motion (or simple CSS intersection observers) to count up stats and fade-in sections.
*   **File:** Site-wide hooks (`useCountUp`, `useIntersectionObserver`)
*   **Before:** Numbers static on page load. "No visible loading orchestration."
*   **After:** `<div>{Math.round(count)}</div>` mapped to a 0→Max animation sequence over 1.5s when scrolled into view.
*   **Owner:** Front-end
*   **Effort:** Medium (2 days)
*   **Impact:** Medium — Increases perceived product quality.
*   **Lenses:** Architect

### Backlog – Strategic (Next Quarter)

| Task | Owner | Description | Lenses |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **B.1 Narrative Case Study** | Marketing, Copy | Build a full before/after club story page. Stop relying on one-off quotes. | Storyteller, GM |
| **B.2 Secondary Accent Color** | Design | Introduce Teal/Navy to the design system to stop over-relying on Orange (reserve Orange strictly for conversion). | Architect |
| **B.3 JetBrains Mono Typography** | Front-end | Implement JetBrains Mono for ALL financial figures site-wide (brand signature data-confidence). | Brand Guardian |
| **B.4 Brass Accent (#B5956A)** | Front-end | Introduce the missing brass accent into dark sections site-wide to establish premium feel. | Brand Guardian |
| **B.5 Trust Center Page** | Engineering, Copy | Create a dedicated page for SOC 2, Data Handling, and API Documentation. | Skeptic |
| **B.6 Demo Video / Modal** | Marketing | Add a 60-second interactive product preview video. | First-Timer, GM |
| **B.7 Deploy Custom Domain** | DevOps | Move away from `vercel.app` staging URL to production domain. | Skeptic, Speedster |
| **B.8 QA Audit Re-run** | QA / PM | Re-run the Swoop Intelligence AI agents on Home, Platform, and About pages at <8000px resolution to fix image ingestion failures. | All |
